signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in January and February but below market forecasts of 2.4%. | NO | HIGH confidence** [2][3]

This marks the latest confirmed data point as of early April 2026, with no newer releases indicated; it aligns with the Bank of Korea's (BOK) 2% target amid contained pressures before Iran-related energy volatility, though core inflati
